signal.title: Cohere's open-weight ASR model hits 5.4% word error rate — low enough to replace speech APIs in production pipelines
signal.reason: Highly relevant. This headline provides a specific, quantifiable technical achievement (5.4% WER) from a key AI startup (Cohere), combined with a significant market implication ('low enough to replace speech APIs in production pipelines'). For a sophisticated investor/technologist, this signals competitive disruption, potential cost savings for businesses, the growing maturity of AI models for real-world application, and the impact of open-weight models on the ecosystem.

signal.title: Michael Koch and the Rise of Hyperlocal Intelligence : From Enterprise AI Pioneer to Building the Next AI Infrastructure Company
signal.reason: Signals a new AI infrastructure venture by an experienced pioneer, highly relevant to investors tracking new companies, funding, and core AI technology development.

signal.title: Palantir Stock in Focus -- Stellantis Expands AI Partnership With 5 - Year Deal
signal.reason: Directly relevant to enterprise AI adoption, funding, and earnings of a key AI player. A multi-year expansion with a major auto manufacturer provides strong signal value about Palantir's platform success and future revenue, impacting the broader AI investment landscape.

signal.title: You can’t blame AI for mistakes, regulator tells auditors
signal.reason: This headline signals crucial regulatory intent regarding AI accountability, directly impacting risk assessment, governance, and practical implementation for companies deploying AI. It's highly relevant for sophisticated investors evaluating liability, operational challenges, and long-term viability of AI-driven ventures and their workforce implications.

tldr: AI innovation surges: Cohere disrupts APIs, Palantir expands, new infra ventures emerge.
Macro pivots: Bond rally signals Fed rate cut bets; Europe's diesel supply tightens.
